objectives.text: 掌握 will 和 be going to 的用法和区别
掌握一般将来时的否定句和疑问句
了解一般将来时的标志词

blocks.content: **will** 用于表示将来的动作或状态，常用于以下场景：

blocks.title: 记忆技巧
blocks.content: will 常用于口语中的临时决定，比如在餐厅点餐时说 I'll have...
**be going to** 用于表示计划、打算或根据迹象预测：

rows: I'm going to study abroad next year.
She is going to visit her grandma.
Look at the clouds. It's going to rain.

blocks.title: 易错提醒
blocks.content: be going to 中的 be 动词要根据主语变化：I am, you are, he/she/it is, we/they are。
一般将来时的常见标志词：

rows: I will go to the park tomorrow.
We are going to have a meeting next week.
People will live on Mars in the future.

blocks.title: 记忆口诀
blocks.content: tomorrow, next week 是将来时的好朋友。in the future, soon 别忘掉。

examples.title: 例1：will 与 be going to 的区别

items: A. Look! It is going to rain.

solution.content: Look! 表示现在能看到的迹象（乌云），根据迹象预测用 be going to。答案选 A。

problem.content: 将肯定句改为否定句和疑问句：He will come to the party.
否定句：He ___ come to the party.
疑问句：___ he ___ to the party?

solution.content: will 的否定句直接加 not：He will not (won't) come to the party. 疑问句将 will 提前：Will he come to the party?

children.text: 临时决定：I'll have a coffee.
计划：I'm going to study abroad.
打算：She is going to visit her grandma.
迹象预测：Look! It's going to rain.
tomorrow, next week, in the future, soon
